title: Why Salah statement shows how Liverpool have become disjointed
summary: Mohamed Salah's social media comments about Liverpool's playing style under manager Arne Slot have prompted pundit analysis suggesting internal discord within the squad. Mark Schwarzer and Dion Dublin interpret Salah's statement as evidence of unhappiness and lack of harmony among players. The situation highlights potential tensions between individual player expectations and the current tactical direction.
content: Match of the Day pundits Mark Schwarzer and Dion Dublin believe Mohamed Salah's comments on social media regarding Liverpool's style of play under Arne Slot show there is a lack of happiness and harmony within the squad.

zh.title: 萨拉赫声明为何显示利物浦已陷入分裂
zh.summary: 穆罕默德·萨拉赫在社交媒体上就利物浦在主帅阿尔内·斯洛特执教下的比赛风格发表评论，引发评论员分析，暗示球队内部存在分歧。马克·施瓦泽和迪翁·都柏林将萨拉赫的声明解读为球员不满和缺乏团结的证据。这种情况突显出球员个人期望与当前战术方向之间的潜在矛盾。

title: Will Wharton be in England's World Cup squad?
summary: Adam Wharton's display in Crystal Palace's 2-2 draw with Brentford has intensified speculation about his inclusion in England's World Cup squad. Pundits suggest the midfielder could secure his spot in Thomas Tuchel's squad with a strong performance in the upcoming UEFA Conference League final. Wharton's recent form indicates he remains a genuine contender for the tournament.
content: BBC Sport pundits Mark Schwarzer and Dion Dublin analyse Adam Wharton's performance in Crystal Palace's 2-2 draw with Brentford and argue that the England midfielder could cement his place in Thomas Tuchel's World Cup squad, if he can have an impressive performance in the UEFA Conference League final.

zh.title: 沃顿能否入选英格兰世界杯大名单？
zh.summary: 亚当·沃顿在水晶宫与布伦特福德2:2平局中的表现加剧了他入选英格兰世界杯大名单的猜测。专家认为这名中场球员可以通过在即将到来的欧足联欧洲协会杯决赛中的出色表现来确保在托马斯·图赫尔球队中的位置。沃顿最近的表现表明他仍然是该赛事的真正竞争者。

title: How 'poor' West Ham were 'torn apart' by Newcastle
summary: Newcastle United exploited significant defensive gaps in West Ham's back three formation to secure a 3-1 victory at St James' Park. Pundits highlighted how West Ham's tactical setup left them vulnerable to Newcastle's attacking play. The performance underscores West Ham's ongoing defensive struggles in the Premier League.
content: BBC Sport pundits Mark Schwarzer and Dion Dublin analyse how Newcastle United were able to exploit large spaces between West Ham's back three, in their 3-1 win at St James' Park in the Premier League.

zh.title: 纽卡斯尔如何将"表现糟糕"的西汉姆联"击垮"
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔联队利用西汉姆联三后卫阵型中的防守漏洞，在圣詹姆斯公园球场以3:1的比分获胜。专家指出西汉姆联的战术布置使他们容易受到纽卡斯尔进攻的打击。这场比赛再次突显出西汉姆联在英超联赛中存在的防守问题。

title: Footballer in mass train attack reveals he was stabbed seven times
summary: Footballer Jonathan Gjoshe revealed he sustained seven stab wounds during a mass knife attack aboard a train traveling through Cambridgeshire last November. The incident injured eleven passengers in total, making it a significant violent crime. Gjoshe's account provides personal testimony to the severity of the attack.
content: Footballer Jonathan Gjoshe was among the 11 passengers seriously injured in a knife attack on a train as it travelled through Cambridgeshire last November.

zh.title: 足球运动员在列车群体袭击中被刺伤七次
zh.summary: 足球运动员乔纳森·久舍在去年11月经过剑桥郡的列车上发生的大规模刀具袭击事件中遭到刺伤七次。该事件共造成11名乘客受伤，是一起重大暴力犯罪。久舍的证词提供了对此次袭击严重程度的亲身见证。

title: Should Cunha's goal have been disallowed?
summary: Pundits question whether Matheus Cunha's goal for Manchester United in their 3-2 victory over Nottingham Forest should have been allowed. The controversy centers on Bryan Mbeumo's use of his arm to control the ball in the build-up play, which commentators argue gave Manchester United an unfair advantage. The incident raises questions about refereeing decisions in the match.
content: BBC Sport pundits Mark Schwarzer and Dion Dublin believe Bryan Mbeumo using his arm to trap the ball to his side to help better control Diego Dalot's cross in the build-up to Matheus Cunha's goal, gave Manchester United an "unfair advantage" in their 3-2 win over Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.

zh.title: 库尼亚的进球应该被判无效吗？
zh.summary: 评论员质疑马蒂乌斯·库尼亚代表曼联在3-2战胜诺丁汉森林的比赛中进的球是否应该被允许。争议的焦点在于布莱恩·姆博乌莫在建立进攻过程中用手臂控制球，评论员认为这给曼联带来了不公平优势。该事件引发了对比赛中裁判判罚的质疑。

title: Chelsea keen on Aston Villa's Rogers - Monday's gossip
summary: Chelsea are reportedly interested in signing Aston Villa's Morgan Rogers, according to transfer speculation. Multiple transfer storylines involve top clubs, including Barcelona's awareness of Aston Villa's interest in Manchester United loanee Marcus Rashford. Manchester City's Rodri remains evasive about his future at the club.
content: Chelsea could make move for Aston Villa's Morgan Rogers, Barcelona aware of Villa interest in Manchester United's on-loan forward Marcus Rashford, Manchester City's Rodri coy on future, plus more.

zh.title: 切尔西对阿斯顿维拉的罗杰斯感兴趣——周一转会传闻
zh.summary: 据转会传闻报道，切尔西有意签下阿斯顿维拉的莫根·罗杰斯。多条转会新闻涉及顶级俱乐部，包括巴塞罗那对阿斯顿维拉有意签下曼联租借球员马库斯·拉什福德的认知。曼城的罗德里对自己在俱乐部的未来仍然含糊其辞。

title: Fans fury as West Ham on brink of drop - how have they got here?
summary: West Ham United face a dramatic reversal of fortune as they approach potential Premier League relegation just three years after winning a European trophy in Prague. The contrast between their recent European success and current league struggles has sparked significant fan frustration. The sharp decline raises questions about strategic decisions and management at the club.
content: It was less than three years ago that West Ham were lifting a European trophy in Prague. But they are now on the verge of relegation from Premier League.

zh.title: 西汉姆联球迷怒火中烧，球队濒临降级——他们是如何走到这一步的？
zh.summary: 西汉姆联队正面临命运的急剧逆转，距离赢得布拉格欧洲奖杯仅三年后，他们即将面临英超降级。近期欧洲赛场的成功与当前联赛的困境形成鲜明对比，引发了球迷的巨大不满。这种急剧下滑令人质疑俱乐部的战略决策和管理能力。

title: Who is pushing for late England World Cup call-up?
summary: Several players are making final pushes to secure spots in Thomas Tuchel's England World Cup squad ahead of the Friday squad announcement. The late campaign by contenders highlights the competitive nature of selection for the tournament. Tuchel's final decision will determine which hopefuls make the cut.
content: With Thomas Tuchel naming his England squad for the World Cup on Friday, which players have made late pushes to be included?

zh.title: 谁在争夺英格兰世界杯大名单的最后席位？
zh.summary: 在周五大名单公布之前，多名球员正在最后冲刺，争取入选托马斯·图赫尔的英格兰世界杯大名单。竞争者的最后冲刺突显了锦标赛选拔的竞争激烈性。图赫尔的最终决定将决定哪些候选人能够入选。

title: Nine teams, four spots - Premier League set for European scramble
summary: Nine Premier League teams are competing for just four European qualification spots, creating an intense and unpredictable battle for continental competition slots. While the title race and relegation fight dominate headlines, the middle-table scramble for European football offers equally compelling drama. The compressed race reflects the competitive depth of the Premier League this season.
content: The Premier League title and relegation fights might be dominating the headlines, but the race for Europe is proving to be an equally chaotic and enthralling battle this season.

zh.title: 九支球队争四个席位——英超欧战资格争夺战即将上演
zh.summary: 九支英超球队为仅有的四个欧洲资格席位而竞争，这场争夺战激烈而充满不确定性。虽然争冠和保级战占据了头条，但中游球队争夺欧战资格的竞争同样引人入胜。这场紧张的争夺反映了英超本赛季的竞争深度。

title: 'I'm really proud of the players' - Howe
summary: Newcastle manager Eddie Howe praised his players' performance and attitude following their 3-1 victory over West Ham United at home. Howe described the team as an "unbelievable group" that played with genuine pride in the dominant display. The performance extends Newcastle's positive momentum in the Premier League.
content: Eddie Howe praises the attitude of his "unbelievable group of players who played with real pride", as Newcastle beat West Ham United 3-1 at St James' Park in the Premier League.

zh.title: "我为球员们感到非常骄傲" - 豪
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔主帅埃迪·豪在3-1击败西汉姆联的主场胜利后，称赞了球员们的表现和态度。豪将这支球队描述为一个"不可思议的群体"，在压倒性表现中展现了真正的骄傲。这场胜利延续了纽卡斯尔在英超的积极势头。

title: West Ham in for 'tough week' after bad performance - Nuno
summary: West Ham manager Nuno Espirito Santo acknowledged his team's poor performance in their 3-1 defeat to Newcastle, signaling difficult days ahead for the club. Nuno's assessment highlighted West Ham's struggles during a critical period of the season. The manager's candid criticism reflects the mounting pressure on the struggling side.
content: Nuno Espirito Santo shares his thoughts on West Ham's "bad performance" against Newcastle United.

zh.title: 表现糟糕后，西汉姆联将迎来"艰难的一周" - 努诺
zh.summary: 西汉姆联主帅努诺·埃斯皮里托·桑托在3-1负于纽卡斯尔后，承认了球队的糟糕表现，预示着俱乐部前路艰难。努诺的评估强调了西汉姆联在赛季关键时期的挣扎。主教练坦诚的批评反映了球队面临的越来越大的压力。

title: Watch Sportscene highlights of Premiership final day
summary: BBC Football highlights the final day of the Scottish Premiership's bottom-six matches. The coverage captures the competitive battles at the foot of the table as the regular season concludes.
content: Highlights from the final day of the Scottish Premiership bottom six.

zh.title: 观看运动场景节目精英联赛最后一天的精彩片段
zh.summary: 英国广播公司足球节目重点介绍了苏格兰超级联赛下半部分比赛的最后一天。报道捕捉了常规赛结束时积分榜底部的激烈竞争。

title: Neymar furious as he is wrongly substituted
summary: Neymar engaged in an angry confrontation with officials after Santos claimed he was improperly substituted during a 3-0 loss to Coritiba. The incident occurred on the eve of Brazil's World Cup squad announcement, adding drama to the selection process. Neymar's frustration over the substitution decision highlighted tensions during the match.
content: Neymar was involved in a furious row with officials after Santos claimed the forward had been wrongly substituted in their 3-0 defeat by Coritiba - a day before Brazil announce their World Cup squad.

zh.title: 内马尔因被错误替换而愤怒
zh.summary: 内马尔在桑托斯声称他在3-0负于科里蒂巴的比赛中被不当替换后，与裁判人员发生了激烈的对抗。这一事件发生在巴西世界杯大名单公布的前夜，为选拔过程增添了戏剧性。内马尔对替换决定的沮丧突显了比赛中的紧张局势。

title: Fulham held to draw at bottom side Wolves
summary: Fulham's European qualification hopes have effectively ended following a draw with relegation-battling Wolverhampton Wanderers in the Premier League. The result against bottom-placed Wolves represented a critical failure in Fulham's bid for continental football. The draw leaves Fulham without a significant competitive objective in the final matches.
content: Fulham's fading hopes of European qualification suffered a terminal blow as they drew against Wolves in the Premier League.

zh.title: 富勒姆与垫底狼队战平
zh.summary: 富勒姆在与保级区的沃尔夫汉普顿流浪者队战平后，欧洲杯资格希望基本宣告结束。与垫底狼队的这场比赛结果对富勒姆争取欧洲足球资格是严重打击。这场平局使富勒姆在剩余比赛中缺乏重大竞争目标。

title: Late Leeds winner deals blow to Brighton's Europa League hopes
summary: Dominic Calvert-Lewin's 96th-minute goal gave Leeds United a dramatic 1-0 victory over Brighton & Hove Albion, damaging the Seagulls' Europa League qualification hopes. Brighton remained in 7th place heading into the final week of the season after the late defeat at Elland Road. The late-stage loss could prove pivotal in the race for European football.
content: Dominic Calvert-Lewin's 96th-minute goal gives Leeds United a 1-0 win over Brighton & Hove Albion at Elland Road, as Fabian Hurzeler's side stay in 7th heading into the final week of the Premier League season.

zh.title: 利兹联后期进球打击布莱顿欧洲联赛希望
zh.summary: 多米尼克·卡尔沃特-莱温在第96分钟的进球帮助利兹联以1:0击败布莱顿和霍夫阿尔比翁，打击了海鸥队的欧洲联赛资格希望。在埃兰路的后期失利后，布莱顿在进入赛季最后一周时仍排在第7位。后期失利可能会在欧洲足球资格竞争中被证明是至关重要的。

title: Fernandes equals assist record as Man Utd beat Forest
summary: Bruno Fernandes equaled the Premier League single-season assist record of 20 with a creative performance as Manchester United defeated Nottingham Forest 3-2 in their final home match. Fernandes' achievement matches the legendary records set by Kevin De Bruyne and Thierry Henry. The midfielder's performance showcased his creative brilliance in a crucial victory.
content: Bruno Fernandes earns his 20th Premier League assist of the season, equalling the record set by Kevin De Bruyne and Thierry Henry, as Manchester United defeat Nottingham Forest 3-2 in their final home game of the campaign at Old Trafford.

zh.title: 费尔南德斯追平助攻纪录，曼联击败森林队
zh.summary: 布鲁诺·费尔南德斯以出色的助攻表现追平了英超单赛季20次助攻纪录，曼联在主场最后一战以3:2击败诺丁汉森林。费尔南德斯的成就与凯文·德布劳内和蒂埃里·亨利创造的传奇纪录相匹配。这位中场球员在这场关键胜利中展现了他的创意天赋。

title: Celtic apologise to Hearts over pitch invasion
summary: Celtic have apologized to Hearts following a pitch invasion at the conclusion of their Scottish Premiership title-decider match. The club has pledged to cooperate fully with police investigating the incident.
content: Celtic have apologised to Hearts and say they will co-operate with a police investigation into the pitch invasion at the conclusion of the clubs' thrilling Scottish Premiership title decider.

zh.title: 凯尔特人因球场入侵向哈茨道歉
zh.summary: 凯尔特人在其苏格兰超级联赛冠军决定性比赛结束时的球场入侵事件后，向哈茨道歉。该俱乐部已承诺完全配合警方调查此事件。

title: Two police officers 'seriously injured' and 14 arrests during Celtic disorder
summary: Two police officers were seriously injured and 14 arrests were made as riot police cleared Glasgow streets during celebrations of Celtic's fifth consecutive Scottish Premiership title. The disorder highlights escalating fan tensions around major sporting events.
content: Riot police had to clear the streets after thousands of fans gathered in Glasgow to celebrate a fifth successive Scottish Premiership title.

zh.title: 凯尔特人骚乱期间两名警官"重伤"和14人被捕
zh.summary: 在庆祝凯尔特人连续第五次获得苏格兰超级联赛冠军期间，防暴警察清理格拉斯哥街道时，两名警官受重伤，14人被逮捕。这次骚乱突显了围绕重大体育赛事的球迷紧张局势升级。

title: Brentford is a club built on trust - Andrews
summary: Brentford manager Keith Andrews reflects on his team's season, emphasizing the club's philosophy built on trust. The comments follow the club's final Premier League home match of the campaign.
content: Brentford boss Keith Andrews reflects on his side's season after their final Premier league home game.

zh.title: 布伦特福德是一支建立在信任基础上的俱乐部 - 安德鲁斯
zh.summary: 布伦特福德主帅基思·安德鲁斯反思了球队的赛季表现，强调了俱乐部建立在信任基础上的哲学。这些评论是在俱乐部本赛季英超主场最后一场比赛后发表的。

title: Man Utd's Bruno Fernandes equals PL assist record
summary: Manchester United's Bruno Fernandes has equalled the Premier League record for most assists in a single season with 20. The achievement underscores his exceptional playmaking contribution during the campaign.
content: Manchester United's Bruno Fernandes has equalled the Premier League record for the most assists recorded in a season after registering his 20th of the campaign.

zh.title: 曼联的布鲁诺·费尔南德斯追平英超单赛季助攻纪录
zh.summary: 曼联的布鲁诺·费尔南德斯以20次助攻追平英超单赛季助攻纪录。这一成就彰显了他在本赛季出色的传中贡献。

title: Rooney suffers injury after saving Pickford shot
summary: Wayne Rooney suffered a wrist injury while saving a shot from goalkeeper Jordan Pickford during a BBC television recording. The injury may require surgery, though it occurred during off-field activity.
content: Wayne Rooney may need surgery after hurting his wrist saving a Jordan Pickford shot during a recording for a BBC show.

zh.title: 鲁尼在扑救皮克福德的射门后受伤
zh.summary: 韦恩·鲁尼在BBC电视录制期间扑救门将乔丹·皮克福德的射门时手腕受伤。该伤势可能需要手术治疗，尽管这是在场外活动中发生的。

title: Chelsea appoint Xabi Alonso as new manager
summary: Chelsea have announced Xabi Alonso as their new manager, with the appointment effective July 1. The move represents a significant managerial change for the club.
content: Xabi Alonso has been named Chelsea's new manager and will begin his role on July 1, the club have announced.

zh.title: 切尔西任命哈维·阿隆索为新主教练
zh.summary: 切尔西宣布哈维·阿隆索为新主教练，任期自7月1日开始生效。这一举措代表了俱乐部的重大主教练变动。

title: Højlund: 'Weird' goodbye to Utd 'feels emotional'
summary: Rasmus Højlund has described his permanent transfer from Manchester United to Napoli as "weird" and emotionally challenging. The move was officially confirmed on Sunday.
content: Rasmus Højlund has said that his "weird" goodbye to Manchester United "feels emotional" after his permanent Napoli switch was confirmed on Sunday.

zh.title: 霍伊伦德：离开曼联的告别"很奇怪"和"感到情感上的压力"
zh.summary: 拉斯穆斯·霍伊伦德将自己从曼彻斯特联队永久转会到那不勒斯队描述为"奇怪"且情感上具有挑战性。该转会于周日正式确认。

title: Pulisic makes return from injury in AC Milan win
summary: Christian Pulisic returned from injury as a second-half substitute to help AC Milan secure a crucial 2-1 victory over Genoa. The win strengthens Milan's position in their season's critical final phase.
content: Christian Pulisic came on as a second-half substitute to help Milan to a crucial 2-1 win at Genoa on Sunday.

zh.title: 普利西奇在AC米兰胜利中伤愈复出
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·普利西奇在下半场作为替补复出，帮助AC米兰以2-1战胜热那亚。这场胜利加强了米兰在赛季关键最后阶段的位置。

title: Pep: Not even 1 beer for Man City after FA Cup win...
summary: Pep Guardiola has prohibited his Manchester City players from celebrating their FA Cup win with alcohol as attention shifts to a crucial Premier League match against Bournemouth. The approach reflects the team's focus on upcoming critical fixtures.
content: Pep Guardiola said his Manchester City players would not be allowed "even one beer" to celebrate their FA Cup success as his attention turned immediately to the crucial Premier League clash with Bournemouth.

zh.title: 佩普：曼城足总杯夺冠后禁酒庆祝
zh.summary: 瓜迪奥拉禁止曼城球员以酒精庆祝足总杯胜利，球队注意力转向对伯恩茅斯的关键英超联赛。这一做法反映了球队对即将到来的重要比赛的专注。

title: Police vow action if criminality in Celtic FT scen...
summary: Police Scotland have pledged "robust and swift action" against anyone found guilty of criminality related to Celtic supporters' pitch invasion. The Scottish Professional Football League condemned the incident as "wholly unacceptable."
content: Police Scotland have vowed to take "robust and swift action" against anybody found to have committed criminality as the Scottish Professional Football League condemned Celtic supporters' "wholly unacceptable" pitch invasion.

zh.title: 警方誓言：凯尔特人赛场暴动若涉犯罪将采取行动
zh.summary: 苏格兰警方承诺对与凯尔特人球迷冲入球场事件相关的犯罪行为采取"果断迅速的行动"。苏格兰职业足球联赛谴责该事件"完全不可接受"。

title: Mourinho's Benfica finish unbeaten but miss UCL
summary: José Mourinho's Benfica completed the season unbeaten but failed to qualify for the Champions League. His agent is reportedly in contact with Real Madrid about a potential coaching role for next season.
content: José Mourinho confirmed Saturday that his agent, Jorge Mendes, is in contact with Real Madrid over potentially returning as coach of the Spanish giants for next season.

zh.title: 穆里尼奥本菲卡不败收官但无缘欧冠
zh.summary: 穆里尼奥执教的本菲卡队以不败战绩完成赛季，但未能获得欧冠资格。据报道，他的经纪人正与皇家马德里接触，讨论下赛季的潜在主教练职位。

title: 🤕Which stars could miss World Cup via injury?
summary: The article examines which key players could miss the upcoming World Cup due to injuries sustained during the season. Player availability will be a crucial factor in tournament preparations for various nations.
content: Which key players might not be participating in this summer's tournament? Here's the latest on injuries impacting World Cup teams.

zh.title: 哪些球星可能因伤缺席世界杯?
zh.summary: 本文探讨了哪些主要球员可能因赛季中受到的伤病而缺席即将到来的世界杯。球员的可用性将是各国世界杯筹备工作中的关键因素。

title: Palace will play 'strongest team' but 'manage minutes' against Arsenal - Glasner
summary: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner says he will field his strongest team against Arsenal in a match that could decide the Premier League title. However, he plans to carefully manage his players' minutes throughout the match.
content: Oliver Glasner says he will play the "strongest team" against Arsenal next week, in a match that could decide the Premier League title, but will manage his side's minutes.

zh.title: 水晶宫将派出"最强阵容"但"控制出场时间"对阵阿森纳 - 格拉斯纳

title: Casemiro's fond farewell - how Brazilian turned Man Utd career around
